== Feedback from New Page Review process ==

I left the following feedback for the creator/future reviewers while reviewing this article: Nice start!

[[User:Mariamnei|Mariamnei]] ([[User talk:Mariamnei|talk]]) 07:45, 2 March 2026 (UTC)

:Thank you! I seem to be Wikipedia's timeline guy, this being my seventh –I've been interviewed here twice, along with other editors, about the COVID-19 pandemic. Not my first time at this rodeo.
:There's been no long, slow build-up here, and I'm especially keen on UTC. There's no lack of material; so much is happening minute-be-minute, more so than with the current Russo-Ukraine War, and we're dealing with four times zones, and arguably five, with Daylight Saving/Summer Time to be playing hop-scotch with our heads at the end of March.  [[User:Kencf0618|kencf0618]] ([[User talk:Kencf0618|talk]]) 15:43, 3 March 2026 (UTC)
::hey timeline guy thank you so much.im an iranian citizen and government banned internet in my country but forgot wikipedia.so this page is my only news reference that I have. Please make an update everytime that you can. Thank you so much. Sorry my english is not good. [[User:ARKO35717|ARKO35717]] ([[User talk:ARKO35717|talk]]) 07:31, 4 March 2026 (UTC)
:::We're plugging in as much information, as fast as we can! So glad (and more than a bit surprised) we're getting through! [[User:Kencf0618|kencf0618]] ([[User talk:Kencf0618|talk]]) 23:13, 4 March 2026 (UTC)
::happy to help too. Sadly i cant do much more as i made my user this week and under the new protected status i cant update anything else anytime soon. [[User:TechMaster360|TechMaster360]] ([[User talk:TechMaster360|talk]]) 10:53, 5 March 2026 (UTC)

== 20:38 UTC Epic Fury claim ==

I reviewed the linked Financial Times article and it doesn't contain a claim for Epic Fury being greenlighted at 20:38 UTC. In fact, it doesn't have any mention of the time of greenlighting it. Besides my read-through I searched for "Epic Fury" "38", and "08" (for the +30 offset) and found nothing. Does anyone have a source with this claim? [[User:Pnorman|Pnorman]] ([[User talk:Pnorman|talk]]) 08:13, 4 March 2026 (UTC)

:{{done}} https://apnews.com/article/iran-united-states-trump-strikes-6c602da7d44cb8c34fa1a9f85f352e4a added to article <small>🔥</small>[[User:Komonzia|Komonzia]] ([[User talk:Komonzia|message]]) 20:26, 5 March 2026 (UTC)

== UTC Formatting ==

I propose that, this being a timeline, each daily event with a specified time, whatever the theater, be placed in that day's own UTC subsection. I have already begun this task. Not all days have time-stamps as of yet. And and I had predicted, this war shall generate more than one theater. 


Secondly, for the sake of those who are not UTC maximalists, would it be technically possible to toggle UTC/Local Time? Thx. [[User:Kencf0618|kencf0618]] ([[User talk:Kencf0618|talk]]) 23:54, 4 March 2026 (UTC)

:I'd be tempted to, instead, follow the convention of [[Timeline of the Syrian civil war]] and not use timestamps. Have sub-articles like [[Timeline of the Syrian civil war (January–April 2011)]] when the conflict reaches the order of months or the page becomes too unwieldy.
:If timestamps are needed, I suggest providing local time (of where it happened) and UTC together. <small>🔥</small>[[User:Komonzia|Komonzia]] ([[User talk:Komonzia|message]]) 19:46, 5 March 2026 (UTC)

== Extended-confirmed-protected edit request on 5 March 2026 ==

{{edit extended-protected|Timeline of the 2026 Iran war|answered=yes}}

*Iranian drones entered Azerbaijani airspace. One drone hit the [[Airport terminal|terminal]] of the [[Nakhchivan International Airport]] and another fell near a school in the village of [[Şəkərabad|Shakarabad]]. This is the first Irani attack on Azerbaijan in this conflict<ref>{{cite web | url =https://www.trend.az/azerbaijan/society/4161114.html|title=Official Baku issues statement on Iran's attack on Nakhchivan|publisher=[[Trend News Agency]]| date= 5 March 2026| accessdate =5 March 2026}}</ref>
<!-- Template:Unsigned --><small class="autosigned">— Preceding [[Wikipedia:Signatures|unsigned]] comment added by [[User:TechMaster360|TechMaster360]] ([[User talk:TechMaster360#top|talk]] • [[Special:Contributions/TechMaster360|contribs]]) </small>
:{{done}} - next time please don't "comment out" your own comment otherwise no one can see it to fullfill the request. --<small>🔥</small>[[User:Komonzia|Komonzia]] ([[User talk:Komonzia|message]]) 19:55, 5 March 2026 (UTC)

== Request to remoce extend-protected edit due to it stalling all updates on the ongoing war situation  ==

Ever since the extended protection has been put in place all updates on the ongoing situation have functionaly full ceased. There are no new updates, and user's created to inform on the ongoing situation are unable to do so due to being newer than 30 days. I request you lower the restriction to authenticated users or drop it entirely. [[User:TechMaster360|TechMaster360]] ([[User talk:TechMaster360|talk]]) 14:11, 5 March 2026 (UTC)
:I disagree. Extended protection forestalls hoards of [[WP:SPA]]s, and the article is being updated multiple times daily by seasoned editors. [[User:Kencf0618|kencf0618]] ([[User talk:Kencf0618|talk]]) 14:21, 5 March 2026 (UTC)
::There have been no updates on March 5. Only one made around midnight, not even anything about the attack on the international Airport in Azerbaijan. These are not the updates of experienced editors but rather a drought lacking edits altogether. [[User:TechMaster360|TechMaster360]] ([[User talk:TechMaster360|talk]]) 14:30, 5 March 2026 (UTC)
::I agree with '''Techmaster'''. There have been no real updates since the Extended-confirmed-protected status has been activated.  5 March 2026 has had no updates since the new status has been placed the entire day remains un updated. The calculation is something vs nothing and this Extended-confirmed-protected status '''leads to nothing being added to the page'''. [[User:SirLionTheMan|SirLionTheMan]] ([[User talk:SirLionTheMan|talk]]) 18:17, 5 March 2026 (UTC)
:Ongoing war situation is an extremely good reason to keep it edit protected, not to mention that this page overlaps a few different Contentious Topics (see [[Wikipedia:Contentious topics]]). <small>🔥</small>[[User:Komonzia|Komonzia]] ([[User talk:Komonzia|message]]) 19:40, 5 March 2026 (UTC)
